member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CheckPatterns
member.summary: Defines the method of calculating check digit.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodeSets
member.summary: Defines the code set in CODE-128.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.QRLevels
member.summary: Defines the error correction level of the QR code.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.ImageInfo
member.summary: Provides the function to retain the image data for the dot module.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.ImageInfo.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.param: Specifies the image data for the dot module in a byte array.
Specifies the width of image data in pixels.
Specifies the height of image data in pixels.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.ImageInfo.GetImage
member.summary: Gets the image data in byte array.
member.returns: Returns a byte array that represents the status of each dot.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.ImageInfo.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of image data in pixels.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.ImageInfo.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of image data in pixels.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase
member.summary: Implements the basic functions to retain the barcode data.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase.BarcodeData
member.summary: Gets or sets the barcode data.
member.remarks: For CODE128/EAN-128, if you want to include a tilde “~” in a code, use 2 tildes together, e.g., ~~.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase.BarcodeDataVisibled
member.summary: Gets or sets to display / not to display the barcode.
member.remarks: The default value is True.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase.Font
member.summary: Gets or sets the barcode data display font.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase.Height
member.summary: Sets the height of the barcode in pixels.
member.remarks: The default value is 50. The width is automatically set. For the QR code, the size is about size of the setup value. Even if the property value is the same, the size will vary because of the data size, error correction level, and the QR code pattern number.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase.RotateFlip
member.summary: Sets or gets the rotate and flip status.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.QRCode.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.
member.remarks: In the case of the QR code, the value of the BarcodeData property is returned as is.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.QRCode.Model
member.remarks: The default value is Model 2.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.QRCode.QRType
member.remarks:
The default value is Auto (QRTypes.QRAuto). The range you can specify will differ depending on the Model property setting.
For Model 1, it is Auto(QRTypes.QRAuto) or 1(QRTypes.QRType1)～14(QRTypes.QRType14).
For Model 2, it is Auto(QRTypes.QRAuto) or 1(QRTypes.QRType1)～40(QRTypes.QRType40).

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.QRCode.CorrectionLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the error correction level.
member.remarks: The default value is M: Restoration level is 15%(QRLevels.QRLevelM)).

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.EanJan.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.EanJan.EanJanType
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of digits.
member.remarks: The default value is 13 digits (EanJanTypes.EanJan13).

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.EanJan.CheckDigit
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to automatically calculate the check digit or not.
member.remarks: The default value is False. If it is True, the check digit calculation result is added when specifying the BarcodeData property. If a 13-digit data is specified to the BarcodeData property, the last digit will be replaced.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.ITF.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.ITF.CheckDigit
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to automatically calculate the check digit or not.
member.remarks: The default value is False. If True, the check digit calculation result is added to the value specified in the BarcodeData property. Also, if the number of digits of BarcodeData plus the check digit result in an odd number, 0 is added to the left. If False is specified and the number of digits set to the BarcodeData property is an odd number, 0 is added to the left.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter
member.summary: Provides functions to create image data to be displayed on the dot module display.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetTextImage(System.String,System.Drawing.Font,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RotateFlipType)
member.summary: Gets the image data from the text.
member.param: Specifies the text that you want to get as an image.
Specifies the font.
Specifies True for a reverse display of white/black; to not reverse, specify False.
Specifies a way to rotate and flip.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetTextImage(System.String,System.Drawing.Font,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the image data from text.
member.param: Specifies the text that you want to get as an image.
Specifies the font.
Specifies True for a reverse display of white/black; to not reverse, specify False.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetTextImage(System.String,System.Drawing.Font)
member.summary: Gets the image data from text.
member.param: Specifies the text that you want to get as an image.
Specifies the font.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RotateFlipType)
member.summary: Gets the image data form a Bitmap object.
member.param: Specifies the Bitmap object that you want to get as an image data.
Specifies the width of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
Specifies a way to rotate and flip the image.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the image data from the Bitmap object.
member.param: Specifies the Bitmap object that you want to get as an image data.
Specifies the width of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetImage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RotateFlipType)
member.summary: Gets the image data from an image file.
member.param: Specifies the absolute path of image file.
Specifies the width of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
Specifies a way to rotate and flip.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.
member.remarks: Image files that can be specified are BMP, GIF, EXIG, JPG, PNG, as well as TIFF.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetImage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the image data from an image file.
member.param: Specifies the absolute path of image file.
Specifies the width of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image data. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.
member.remarks: Image files that can be specified are BMP, GIF, EXIG, JPG, PNG, as well as TIFF.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetBarcode(AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase)
member.param: Specifies the barcode information object.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetRectangle(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a rectangle and gets the image data.
member.param: Specifies the width of a rectangle in pixels.
Specifies the height of a rectangle in pixels.
Specifies the thickness of the border in pixels. The border is painted black and inside is white. If the thickness is specified with 0, it will be filled with black.
Specify True to reverse white/black. To not reverse, specify False.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetEllipse(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an ellipse and gets the image data.
member.param: Specifies the width of an ellipse in pixels.
Specifies the height of the ellipse in pixels.
Specifies the thickness of the border in pixels. The border is painted black and inside is white. If the thickness is specified with 0, it will be filled with black.
Specify True to reverse white/black. To not reverse, specify False.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetLine(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a straight line and gets the image data.
member.param: Specifies the width of a rectangle for the straight diagonal line.

Specifies the height of the rectangle for the straight diagonal line. If a positive value is specified, the straight line goes toward the bottom right; if a negative value is specified, the straight line goes toward the top right. (when the width is positive)
Specifies the thickness of the line in pixels.
Specifies True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data you created.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.Dispose
member.summary: Executes the release and reset of unmanaged resource associated with the application-defined tasks.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.ClearDisplay
member.remarks: After clearing, it is filled with white.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.GetLocalDisplayImage
member.summary: Gets the image data of the logic display.
member.remarks: The data obtained with this method is specified to the image data of the XA command.
member.returns: An ImageInfo object that includes the image data of the logic display.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutText(System.String,System.Drawing.Font,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RotateFlipType)
member.summary: Arranges the character string on to the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the text that you want to display as an image.
Specifies the font.
Specifies the x coordinate to arrange on the logic display.
Specifies the y coordinate to arrange on the logic display.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
Specifies a way to rotate and flip the image.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutText(System.String,System.Drawing.Font,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Arranges the character string on to the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the text that you want to display as an image.
Specifies the font.
Specifies the x coordinate to arrange on the logic display.
Specifies the y coordinate to arrange on the logic display.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutText(System.String,System.Drawing.Font,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Arranges the character string on to the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the text that you want to display as an image.
Specifies the font.
Specifies the x coordinate to arrange on the logic display.
Specifies the y coordinate to arrange on the logic display.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RotateFlipType)
member.summary: Specifies the Bitmap object and arrange on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the Bitmap object that you are arranging.
Specifies the x coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the y coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the width of the image that you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
Specifies a way to rotate and flip.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Specifies the Bitmap object and arrange on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the Bitmap object that you are arranging.
Specifies the x coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the y coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the width of the image that you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutImage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RotateFlipType)
member.summary: Specify the image file and arrange on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the absolute path of the image file you are arranging.
Specifies the x coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the y coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the width of the image that you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
Specifies a way to rotate and flip.
member.remarks: Image files that can be specified are BMP, GIF, EXIG, JPG, PNG, as well as TIFF.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutImage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Specify the image file and arrange on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the absolute path of the image file you are arranging.
Specifies the x coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the y coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the width of the image that you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specifies the height of the image you are arranging. If you specify a different size than the original size, the image will enlarge or shrink.
Specify True if you are dithering when changing to a white/black image.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.
member.remarks: Image files that can be specified are BMP, GIF, EXIG, JPG, PNG, as well as TIFF.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutBarcode(AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.BarcodeBase,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Arranges the barcode on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the barcode information object.
Specifies the x coordinate for arranging the barcode image.
Specifies the y coordinate for arranging the barcode image.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutLine(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Draw a straight line on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the x coordinate of the start of the straight line.
Specifies the y coordinate of the start of the straight line.
Specifies the x coordinate of the end of the straight line.
Specifies the y coordinate of the end of the straight line.
Specifies the thickness of the line in pixels.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutRectangle(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Draw a rectangle on the logic display.
member.param: Specifies the x coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the y coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the width.
Specifies the height.
Specifies the thickness of the border in pixels. The border line is black and inside is white. If the thickness is specified with 0, it is filled with black.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.PutEllipse(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Arrange an ellipse on the logical display.
member.param: Specify the x coordinate for arranging.
Specify the y coordinate for arranging.
Specifies the width of the ellipse in pixels.
Specifies the height of the ellipse in pixels.
Specifies the thickness of the border in pixels. It is drawn with a black border line and inside is white. If the thickness is specified with 0, it is filled with black.
Specify True for a white/black reverse display. To not reverse, specify False.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.Preview
member.summary: Gets the Bitmap object for the preview of the logic display.
member.remarks: An “x” is drawn on the barcode image; the barcode is drawn only on the dot module display.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.UPC.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.UPC.CheckDigit
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to automatically calculate the check digit.
member.remarks: The default value is False. If it is True, the check digit calculation result is added to the data specified with the Barcode Data property. If 12 digits are specified in the BarcodeData property, the last digit will be replaced.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.UPC.UpcType
member.summary: Gets or specifies the UPC type.
member.remarks: The default value is UPC-A(UPCTypes.UPCA).

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.Code128.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.
member.remarks: In the case of CODE128, control code and check digit will not be included.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.Code128.CodeSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the code set.
member.remarks: The default value is code set B. If a value not in the code set is specified to the BarcodeData property, the code set is automatically switched. Example: Code set A was specified but used the lower case “a”: "(CODE A)A(CODE B)a".

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.Code39.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.Code39.CheckDigit
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to automatically calculate check digit.
member.remarks: The default value is False. If it is True, the check digit calculation result is added to the value specified with the Barcode Data property.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.EAN128
member.remarks: When specifying a control code, specify in any part of the BarcodeData property with a ~ (tilde) + code name. For example: To switch to CODE-B in the middle: "1234~CODEBABC".

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.EAN128.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode character string.
member.remarks: In the case of EAN128(GS1-128), the control code and check digit are excluded.

member.name: T:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodaBar
member.summary: Defines the setting information of CodeBar(NW-7).

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodaBar.GetNativeValue
member.summary: Gets the barcode character string of the output barcode.
member.returns: Returns the barcode characters.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodaBar.CheckDigit
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to automatically calculate check digit or not.
member.remarks: The default value is False. If True, the check digit calculation result is added to the value specified to the Barcode Data property.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodaBar.StartChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the start character.
member.remarks: The default value is ‘a’.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodaBar.StopChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the end character.
member.remarks: The default value is ‘a’.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.Barcode.CodaBar.CheckPattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the check digit calculation method.
member.remarks: The default value is modulus 16.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.#ctor
member.remarks: Set the logic display size to 200x96, and preview becomes valid.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.#ctor(AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.DisplaySizeType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance by specifying the size of the logic display and valid/invalid of preview.
member.param: Type of display size.
Specify "true" when preview of the logic display is used. Otherwise specify "false".
member.remarks: When preview is invalid, the processing speed becomes faster than when it is valid.

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance by specifying the size of the logic display and valid/invalid of preview.
member.param: The width in pixels.
The height in pixels.
Specify "true" when preview of the logic display is used. Otherwise specify "false".

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.SetDisplaySize(AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.DisplaySizeType,System.Boolean)
member.param: Type of display size.
Specify "true" when preview of the logic display is used. Otherwise specify "false".

member.name: M:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.SetDisplaySize(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.param: The width in pixels.
The height in pixels.
Specify "true" when preview of the logic display is used. Otherwise specify "false".

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.DisplaySizeValue
member.summary: Gets the width and height, in pixels, of this display.

member.name: P:AioiSystems.DotModule.DisplayPainter.Preview
member.summary: Get the Bitmap object for the preview of the logic display.
member.remarks: This is used only when preview is set to valid while creating the instance. It returns null if preview is invalid. An "x" is drawn on the barcode image of preview; but only the barcode will be drawn on the dot module display.
